name: Grilled Garden Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped fresh basil or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the warm water, yeast, olive oil, and sugar. Let it stand for 10 minutes or until foamy.
2. In another bowl, mix together the flour and oats. Gradually add the yeast mixture while mixing on low speed with an electric mixer for an additional 2 minutes. The dough will be soft.
3. Knead the dough on a floured surface five times. Place it in a medium bowl sprayed with no-stick cooking spray, turning once to coat. Cover and let rise in a warm place for 30 minutes or until almost doubled.
4. Punch down the dough, divide into four portions, and roll each into a 6-inch circle on a floured surface.
5. Grill over medium-hot coals for 2 to 4 minutes per side or until the bottom is golden brown.
6. Remove from grill and, on the uncooked side, layer the remaining ingredients in the order listed: Romano cheese, half of the mozzarella, green pepper, onion, basil, garlic, and tomatoes.
7. Return to grill, cover, and cook for 4 to 6 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown and the cheese begins to melt.
8. To bake in the oven, preheat to 425 degrees. Spray a cookie sheet with no-stick cooking spray or oil lightly. Place each portion of dough on the prepared sheet and roll into a 6-inch circle. Layer with Romano, half of the mozzarella, green pepper, onion, basil, garlic, and tomatoes. Bake for 25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Sprinkle immediately with remaining cheese.
